name: The Temple Guardian
description: A towering figure of burnished bronze steps from the altar niche, its eyes blazing with golden fire. The Guardian of the Grail Temple raises a sword wreathed in holy light and speaks a single word: Prove. The flagstones tremble beneath your feet.
failureConsequence: The Guardian's blazing sword sweeps you from the nave. You land in the courtyard, humbled and aching, the temple doors sealed until you find the strength to try again.
